channel.title: Martin Besozzi
channel.description: AI Security Architect & IAM Architect. Writing about identity, agents, authn & authz.

item.title: Agent Intent Authorization: Plan-Before-Execute Security for AI Agents
item.description: Agent Intent Authorization introduces a plan-before-execute security model for AI agents — the full execution scope is cryptographically approved before any action begins.

item.title: AI Agents Require Runtime Authorization: Just-In-Time Passkey Approval for Sensitive Actions
item.description: How the Agent Native Authorization (ANA) framework enforces Just-In-Time passkey approval for sensitive AI agent actions — no browser redirects, cryptographic proof, open standards.

item.title: Passkeys Just-In-Time Authorization for AI Agents: In Action with Claude Code
item.description: A practical look at device-bound passkey approval for sensitive AI agent actions in Claude Code, shifting from standing session trust to action-level verification.

item.title: Securing AI Coding Agents with Real-Time Just-In-Time Authorization: Claude Code and GitHub Copilot CLI
item.description: A real-time JIT authorization pattern for CLI-based AI coding agents, using human-in-the-loop approval, OAuth, MCP, and cryptographic proof.

item.title: Mastering Secure APIs and AI Agents with Zero Trust and Fine-Grained Authorization Based on OpenID AuthZEN
item.description: A practical guide to securing APIs, MCP servers, and AI agents with Zero Trust and fine-grained authorization using the OpenID AuthZEN standard.

item.title: Agentic AI Security: Protecting Interactive Keycloak MCP App with OpenID AuthZEN Gateway for FGA
item.description: How the TwoGenIdentity AuthZEN MCP Gateway protects an interactive Keycloak MCP App with standardized, externalized fine-grained authorization.

item.title: Securing MCP Apps with the AuthZEN MCP Gateway: Fine-Grained Authorization for Interactive AI Experiences
item.description: A fintech expense-management MCP App scenario showing AuthZEN-based fine-grained authorization for interactive AI workflows.

item.title: AuthZEN: Standardized Authorization for API and AI Security
item.description: Introducing an AuthZEN plugin for Apache APISIX that turns an API and AI gateway into a standardized Policy Enforcement Point.

item.title: Agentic AI Platform for Enterprise IAM: Secure Agent-Driven Governance with Keycloak MCP, Based on Zero-Trust Principles and Fine-Grained Authorization - From Vision to Implementation
item.description: A comprehensive guide to building a secure enterprise IAM platform with Keycloak MCP, AuthZEN, and AI agents — covering architecture, open standards, and real-world implementation.

item.title: Building Scalable Multi-Tenancy Authentication and Authorization using Open Standards and Open-Source Software
item.description: How to build scalable multi-tenancy authentication and authorization for B2B platforms using Keycloak Organizations, OpenFGA ReBAC, and Apache APISIX.

item.title: Deep Dive into Enhancing User Experience with Native Authentication (OAuth 2.0 for First-Party Apps) and Passkeys in Keycloak
item.description: A deep dive into native authentication for first-party apps using OAuth 2.0 and Passkeys in Keycloak — eliminating browser redirects for a seamless login experience.

item.title: Mastering Access Control: Low-Code Authorization with ReBAC, Decoupling Patterns and Policy as Code
item.description: How to implement low-code, fine-grained authorization using ReBAC, decoupling patterns, and Policy as Code — with Keycloak, OpenFGA, and Apache APISIX.

item.title: Keycloak Workshop for Step Up with MFA Biometrics Authentication (Passkeys) and Passwordless experience with Passkey autofill
item.description: A hands-on workshop covering step-up authentication with MFA, biometric Passkeys, passwordless login, and Passkey autofill using Keycloak.

item.title: Keycloak integration with OpenFGA (based on Zanzibar) for Fine-Grained Authorization at Scale (ReBAC)
item.description: How to integrate Keycloak with OpenFGA (inspired by Zanzibar) to implement scalable Relationship-Based Access Control (ReBAC) with fine-grained authorization.

item.title: Keycloak Step-Up and Multi-factor Authentication (MFA) for Web Apps and API
item.description: How to implement step-up authentication and Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for web apps and APIs using Keycloak, with ACR levels and OPA policy enforcement.
